name: FAI_EVALUATION_RUNS
description: This table stores information about evaluation runs.

columns.Name: EVAL_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Autogenerated number and primary key for this table.

columns.Name: EVAL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the FAI_EVALUATIONS table.

columns.Name: TARGET_OBJ_STATE
columns.Comments: The state of the Workflow or Prompt used in the evaluation run.

columns.Name: SESSION_ID
columns.Comments: Session ID related to the evaluation run.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start time of the evaluation run.

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: End time of the evaluation run.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The status of the evaluation run.

columns.Name: EVAL_SPEC
columns.Comments: A snaphot of evaluation configurations in JSON format used for the evaluation run.

columns.Name: MEDIAN_CORRECTNESS
columns.Comments: Median correctness of the evaluation run.

columns.Name: MEDIAN_LATENCY
columns.Comments: Median latency of the evaluation run.

columns.Name: ERROR_COUNT
columns.Comments: Error count of the evaluation run.

columns.Name: INPUT_TOKENS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of input tokens in the evaluation run.

columns.Name: OUTPUT_TOKENS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of output tokens in the evaluation run.

columns.Name: JOBS_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of jobs for the evaluation run.

columns.Name: GROUNDEDNESS
columns.Comments: Correctness of the evaluation run

columns.Name: ANSWER_RELEVANCE
columns.Comments: Answer relevance of the evaluation run

columns.Name: CONTEXT_RELEVANCE
columns.Comments: Context relevance of the evaluation run

columns.Name: COVERAGE
columns.Comments: Stores the coverage metrics of the evaluation run

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
